title: gastrodia umbrosa
intro: Gastrodia umbrosa, also known as Tiān Dōng or Chinese Gastrodia, is a type of plant species in the orchid family that is native to China and other parts of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its medicinal properties in treating neurological disorders, such as epilepsy and Parkinson's disease, due to its ability to enhance cognitive function and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Gastrodia umbrosa include improved memory and concentration, reduced anxiety and stress, and enhanced overall brain function. Gastrodia umbrosa is typically prepared as a herbal supplement or tea, with the roots being the most commonly used part of the plant.
